calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Feb-02-2010 Granted Per Written Order

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (351 Topeka Ave. S.F.)
Off Calendar Sep-28-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Rowena Navia for LaRhonda Carter and Elston Drummer (Administrators).

The sale was confirmed at $480,000.00. Bond is waived. The Court granted the petition (signing the order for the same in open court).

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Maria Lertore, CSR#11935. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Capozzoli.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar May-20-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Rowena Navia for and with Elston Drummer and LaRhonda Carter (Petitioners).

Ms. Navia stated that she made efforts to locate the witnesses, to locate the attorney that drafted the will and that the proposed Executor stated that the Decedent intended to change the will. In addition, she stated that she could not meet the standard of clear and convincing and that she had done as much as she could. The Court stated that it seemed that the flaws in the will were typographical errors, that the will should be offered into probate and took the matter under submission.

Judge: David L. Ballati. Reporter: Susan Lee, CSR#4280. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Capozzoli/J. Gomez.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar May-06-2009 Continued To May-20-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
